title: Office Supplies Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for total cost of office supplies, incorporating lean inventory principles, waste reduction, and data confidence adjustments.

inputs.label: Annual Usage (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of office supply units (e.g., reams of paper, pens) consumed per year.

inputs.label: Unit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average purchase cost per unit of the office supply item.

inputs.label: Order Cost per Purchase Order
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cost associated with placing a single purchase order (labor, processing, etc.).

inputs.label: Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inventory holding cost as a percentage of unit cost (storage, insurance, obsolescence).

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of supplies wasted due to over-ordering, expiration, or damage.

inputs.label: Order Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often orders are placed, affecting order size and inventory levels.

inputs.label: Use Lean Inventory Principles
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, applies just-in-time ordering to reduce holding costs and waste.

rules.message: Waste percentage must be less than 100%.
Lean inventory requires weekly or biweekly ordering frequency.

thresholds.message: Waste percentage exceeds 15% – consider root cause analysis.
Annual holding cost exceeds $5,000 – review inventory turnover.

formulas.label: Optimal Order Quantity (EOQ)
formulas.description: Economic Order Quantity based on annual usage, order cost, and holding cost.

formulas.label: Annual Waste Cost
formulas.description: Cost of wasted supplies due to over-ordering or damage.

formulas.label: Lean Inventory Adjustment
formulas.description: If lean inventory is enabled, reduces holding cost by 30% and waste by 50%.

formulas.label: Total Supply Cost (Base)
formulas.description: Base cost of supplies without waste and holding.

formulas.label: Total Annual Cost (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Comprehensive total cost including ordering, holding, waste, and lean adjustments.

primary.label: Total Annual Cost
primary.description: Primary result: total annual cost of office supplies including all cost drivers.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excess Inventory Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of inventory beyond optimal EOQ due to infrequent ordering.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Obsolescence Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated cost of supplies becoming obsolete before use.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Waste
suggestedActions.description: Implement 5S and root cause analysis to reduce waste below 10%.
suggestedActions.impact: Potential savings of up to 20% on waste cost.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Order Frequency
suggestedActions.description: Switch to weekly ordering to lower holding costs and align with lean principles.
suggestedActions.impact: Reduces holding cost by up to 40%.

suggestedActions.label: Adopt Lean Inventory
suggestedActions.description: Enable lean inventory toggle to automatically reduce waste and holding costs.
suggestedActions.impact: Combined reduction of 30% in holding and 50% in waste costs.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Total Cost
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total cost adjusted for data confidence (e.g., ±10% uncertainty in inputs).
